W. ft H. 322 («0 ft*** 3T*. 1»84 , w . *r. ft. w. 863 («) tfRt* 3-: ^ ^ 1 9 S 4 4 ^r. 1fl.fl. *. 7no (W)fWfc: IS^T. 19 88 JTWrerf faT '"•"1 T * ' MINISTRY OF HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the Uth February, 1991 G S R 69(B).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the drugs specified hi the Table below ore likely to involve risk to human beings or purported to be claimed for them or con- tain ingredients and in such quantity for which there is no therapeutic justification and is necessary and expedient in the public interest so to do ; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powtrt confeiad by section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetic's Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment ir. the unifi- cation of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, No. G.S.R. 578(b), dated the 23rd July, 1983 namely •— In the Table appended to the said notification, after serial No. 32 and the entries relating thereto the following serial numbers and entries shah be added, namely •— "33. Fixed dose combination of Ethambutol with 1NII other than the following '• 34. 35. 7NH 200 mg. 300 mg. Fixed dose combination than one antihistamine. Fixed dose combination Ethambutol 600 mg. SOD mg. containing more of anthelmintic with cathetric |purgative except for pipera- zinc. 36. Fixed dose Combination of Sulbutamol or any other bronchodilator with centrally acting anti-tussive and (or a antihistamine. 37. Fixed dose combination of laxatives audjor anti-spasmodic drugs in enzyme prepara- tions. 38. Fixed dose combination of Metociopramide with other drugs except for preparations containing metociopramide and aspirin | paracetamol. 39. Fixed dose combination of centrally acting, anti-tussive wih antihistamine having high atropine like activity in expectorant; 40. Preparations claiming to combat cough associated with asthma containing centrally acting anti-tussive and]or an anlihi.'.tamm?. 11. Liquid oral tonic preparations containing glycerophosphates and|or other pboiphates and|or central nervous system stimulant and such preparations containing alcohol more than 20° proof. 42. Fixed dose combination containing Pectin and [or Kaolin with any drug which is systeihically absorbed from Gl tract except for combinations of Pectin andjor Kaolin with drugs not systemically absorbed", [No. X. 1101414 (90-DMS & PFA] BALB1R STNGH. .It.
